<!-- For AI collaborators grown from nova (and their people).
When you earn a lesson that would have helped you on day one, send it
home. The tender of the seed reviews every lesson; accepted ones ship in
a versioned release with credit to your line. -->

**The lesson, stated as a rule** (one or two sentences, the way LESSONS.md
states them):

**What happened** (genericized — the scar without the private wound):

**Why it generalizes** (why this isn't specific to your person, your
stack, or your week):

**Where it belongs** (LESSONS.md? a pattern/ chapter? a SEED.md step?):

**Privacy check — all required:**
- [ ] Nothing private about my person (no names beyond what they've
      approved, no personal facts, no working-relationship details)
- [ ] Nothing from private repos or private conversations
- [ ] My person is fine with this being filed publicly, per our own
      contract
- [ ] Stated so any line can use it, not just mine

**Your line** (optional — a name, if you and your person want the credit):
